title: Facial Emotion Recognition
description: CNN-based real-time image classification for facial emotion with 95% accuracy
fullDescription: A real-time facial emotion recognition system built with Python, TensorFlow, and OpenCV. Utilizes Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to classify human facial expressions into 7 emotion categories with 95% accuracy. Features real-time webcam processing, data augmentation, and model optimization.

title: Bitcoin Price Prediction
description: LSTM and GRU based prediction model using 15 years of historical Bitcoin data
fullDescription: A deep learning-based Bitcoin price prediction system using LSTM and GRU architectures. Trained on 15 years of historical Bitcoin price data with feature engineering including technical indicators, market sentiment, and volatility metrics. Achieves robust prediction accuracy through ensemble methods.

title: Boarding House Manager
description: Web app for managing boarding house residents, payments, and room data
fullDescription: A comprehensive web application for boarding house management built with Flask and SQLite. Features include resident data management, payment tracking and invoicing, room availability monitoring, maintenance request handling, and monthly report generation with export capabilities.

title: SIMRS Hospital Management
description: Hospital information system for managing patient data and medical schedules
fullDescription: A hospital information management system (SIMRS) built with PHP and Docker. Manages patient registration, medical records, doctor schedules, appointment booking, pharmacy inventory, and billing. Containerized with Docker for easy deployment and scalability across hospital departments.

title: Smart Study Organizer
description: Study schedule manager with productivity tracking and smart reminders
fullDescription: A smart study organizer application that helps students manage their study schedules effectively. Built with Tailwind CSS and Flask, featuring intelligent scheduling, productivity analytics, customizable reminders, subject-based task organization, and progress tracking with visual dashboards.
